tests.description: fmt: 基本格式化（默认行为），自动折行到默认宽度
setup_commands: echo 'This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.' > test_fmt.txt

execution.stdout:
This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to
exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that
we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without
breaking words.

tests.description: fmt: 指定行宽 (-w)，所有输出行长度不超过指定宽度且不拆分单词
fmt: 多文件输入，按参数顺序依次格式化输出，不额外插入分隔符
setup_commands: echo 'This is the first file with some text that will be formatted by fmt.' > test_fmt1.txt
echo 'Here is the second file. It also contains text to be formatted according to the default width.' > test_fmt2.txt

execution.stdout:
This is the first file with some text that will be
formatted by fmt.
Here is the second file. It also contains text to be
formatted according to the default width.

tests.tstdin: This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.
tests.description: fmt: 从标准输入读取文本并格式化输出

execution.stdout:
This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to
exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that
we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without
breaking words.

setup_commands:
echo 'This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.

This is the second paragraph that is intentionally written to exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.' > test_fmt.txt

execution.stdout:
This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to exceed
the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify
whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.

This is the second paragraph that is intentionally written to exceed
the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify
whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.

setup_commands:
echo '    This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without breaking words.
   this is second line.
   this is third line.' > test_fmt.txt

execution.stdout:
This is a very long line of text that is intentionally written to
exceed the default line width used by the fmt command so that
we can verify whether it correctly wraps the line without
breaking words.

tests.description: fmt: 只包含空行的文件
fmt: 单个超长单词，不应该被拆分
